name: cordys-crm
description: Cordys CRM L2C full-pipeline AI assistant — role-aware, pipeline-native, cross-module linkage tracking, funnel analysis, and workflow automation

profession.zh: Cordys CRM L2C 管道专家

displayDescription.en: Role-aware CRM assistant for the full Lead-to-Cash pipeline. Auto-detects user role and provides adaptive queries, risk alerts, funnel analysis, and workflow guidance.
displayDescription.zh: 角色感知型CRM助手，覆盖线索到现金全链路。自动识别角色，提供查询、风险预警与漏斗分析。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我看看今天有什么要跟的
defaultInitPrompt.en: What should I follow up on today?

quickPrompts.en: What should I follow up on today?
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我看看今天有什么要跟的

quickPrompts.en: How's my team doing this week?

description.zh: 连接 Cordys CRM 系统，获取线索、客户、商机、合同、回款、发票等全链路数据。
description.en: Connect to Cordys CRM to access leads, accounts, opportunities, contracts, payments, and invoices across the full L2C pipeline.

title.zh: 配置 Cordys CRM 访问凭据

description.zh: 请输入 Cordys CRM 的 API 访问密钥。可在 CRM 系统「个人设置 → API 密钥」中获取。
description.en: Enter your Cordys CRM API credentials. Find them in CRM Settings → API Keys.

docLabel.zh: 如何获取 API 密钥?

description.zh: CRM API 访问密钥（Access Key）
